title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!
